prompt.content:
Utilizing the 9th-grade - biology grades. Make a document that lists the assignment names and the total number of “NHI”s for each assignment category.

Assignment categories:
*”Case Study” if an assignment includes the phrase “case study”
* “Lab” if an assignment includes the phrase “experiment and/or lab”
* Historical Rat Study and the Rat Modeling Investigations are both “Bellwork”.
* Exploring Juncos and the Letter from Lamarck are both “Homework”.
* “Quiz” if an assignment has the phrase “quiz”.
*”Exam” if an assignment has the phrase “exam”

Avoid Quiz & Exam assignment from the analysis. Round the number of NHIs to the nearest whole number
